log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, likely a spreader with overlay capabilities. Investigate the network activity to see if it communicates with any command and control servers.
The sample does not appear to have any network activity. Investigate the registry changes to see if it attempts to persist on the system.
The sample does not appear to attempt to persist on the system through the registry. Investigate the dropped files to see if it writes any files to disk.
The sample does not appear to write any files to disk. Investigate the process activity to see if it spawns any suspicious processes or modules.
